title: Anthropic Just Dropped Fable 5 And It’s Terrifying
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class AI model with advanced capabilities in software engineering, knowledge work, vision, and analytics. Anthropic implemented safety systems to restrict its capabilities in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology, introducing capability limitation as a deployment practice for frontier models.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as a Mythos-class model with capabilities spanning software engineering, knowledge work, vision, and analytics. It matters because Anthropic paired the release with safety systems that restrict the model's abilities in high-risk areas such as cybersecurity and biology. The key takeaway is the introduction of capability limitation as a deployment practice for frontier models, deliberately constraining what the system can do rather than maximizing its reach.
